questions.prompt: Render shape on bar when condition true?

choices.text: plotshape(condition, shape.triangleup, location.belowbar, color.green). Renders only on true bars. Use shape.arrowup, circle, diamond, cross for variety.
p1 = plot(upper); p2 = plot(lower); fill(p1, p2, color.new(color.blue, 80)). Assign plot() to variables; pass to fill(). Used for bands, channels, ranges.

questions.explanation: fill() takes two plot() returns; ideal for bands.
